title: Why Your Phone Uses More Power Than A Light Bulb

segments.text: Your smartphone drains more energy than a 60-watt bulb.
It's not just apps; it's the screen that consumes it.
Screens use about 75% of your phone’s energy.
Plus, data processing adds even more power demands.
So, your phone's energy usage is no laughing matter.
This tiny device demands as much power as a bulb!
Follow Curio for your daily dose of science.

description: Your phone’s energy use is shocking. Follow for daily science & tech! ⚡
